title: KandyToys Miniature Plastic Easter Egg Unicorn Pony Toy - Assorted Colours
features: Pop open the egg for a pretty unicorn toy
Ideal for use as birthday party bag fillers and easter treats!
Unicorn measures approximately 7cm x 5cm x 3cm ~ egg stands 9cm high
Please note that the unicorn design varies ~ one will be chosen at random
description: Product Description Pop open this egg to set free the pretty unicorn pony inside! Beautiful pink and purple design, with a long mane and tail. Perfectly sized as a party bag filler for unicorn-mad little ones, a Christmas stocking filler or a cute alternative to chocolate sweets on an Easter egg hunt! Safety Warning Suitable for Ages 3+
